channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's reversal on Iran sanctions would undo decades of restrictions
item.description: The 14-point memorandum signed by Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on June 17 calls for the removal of all U.S. sanctions on Iran.

item.title: Putin acknowledges Russia is facing a difficult period as Ukrainian drone strikes disrupt fuel supplies
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak said Moscow is reviewing fuel export agreements to avoid compromising domestic needs.

item.title: Iran pushes the U.S. into an escalation trap as tensions over the Strait of Hormuz threaten the fragile ceasefire
item.description: "The collision course is set, and worse is yet to come."

item.title: One in three Gen Zers uses AI for homebuying research but still trusts realtors for closing
item.description: Over half of prospective buyers prefer human guidance for legal or contractual matters.
